observations.archetype_gloss: Deity of Curiosity, subtle thematic hyperlink for Truth and Love
observations.summary: The narrator acts as a Wise Guide, offering comfort and direction to Dan, promising restoration and a peaceful life, guiding him through the ordeal of death and spiritual passage.

evidence.quote: "I offer you a raft, so that the friction of death shall lose its sting. Follow me. I shall restore your mother's voice to you in the night—dreams in which she speaks comfort unceasing. I shall give you a wife whose hands need not be reddened by lye. Sons who will never know the stench of their grandfather's shame. The sluggish, sweet warmth of a life forgotten by the cruelties of the heights. The life your mother desired for you—peaceful, whole, and forgotten by the terrible heights that demand all."
